name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Bears app workflow plugin with deterministic graph compilation, immutable process journal, semantic audits, repo-scoped execution, and audited convergence.

interface.shortDescription: DIRECT routing and bounded repo app waves.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides structured app stages, deterministic trace/process compilation, immutable process events, bounded dependency and impact queries, semantic/process audits, graph-linked task planning, repo-scoped implementation, and remediation convergence.
defaultPrompt: Resume app workflow stages with one DIRECT primary.
Trace app dependencies and change impact through the read-only graph index.
Execute repo-scoped ledger queues with bounded workers and immutable review.
